case_title: BRENDA LEATHERS DBA DANROSE CDF et al VS LUIS PEREDA IND & DBA BENY'S IRON WORKS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRENDA LEATHERS DBA DANROSE CDF COSTA, LEO DBA DANROSE CDF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUIS PEREDA IND & DBA BENY'S IRON WORKS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,055.00, THE CLAIM IS AMENDED TO CORRECT DEFENDNAT'S NAME TO: LUIS PEREDA IND & DBA BENY'S IRON WORKS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BRENDA LEATHERS DBA DANROSE CDF COSTA, LEO DBA DANROSE CDF AS TO DEFENDANT LUIS PEREDA IND & DBA BENY'S IRON WORKS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-21-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
